name: X Wars Deluxe
short_description: Liberate your people! Defeat evil! Conquer the 4 armies in this Turn Based Strategy masterpiece ;)
detailed_description:
Liberate your people! Defeat evil! Conquer the 4 armies in this Turn Based Strategy masterpiece ;)

Features


  • Advance in Dozens of campaign missions!
  • Dozens of multiplayer maps (2 Players and 4 Players).
  • Online and Local Multiplayer.
  • Lots of Units to Build and Control.
  • A story that if made a movie would get 11+ Oscars!

The Units


From Foot Soldiers to Tanks, Helicopters, Jets, Submarines, Ships. A huge arsenal to choose from. Build your units and achieve victory!

The Story


4 Big armies in conflict. Embark in an emotive story about love and... war.
